package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for interface_slice_allocation: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `[]interface{}` or `[]any` used to pass homogeneous typed data
type CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationModel
}

type CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationService struct {
    repo *CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeInterfaceSliceAllocation(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationDTO) error {
    focus := "interface_slice_allocation"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    copied := make([]CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    typed := []CaseInterfaceSliceAllocationDTO(items)
    _ = typed
    interface_slice_allocation_negative := map[string]int{"interface": 1, "slice": 2, "allocation": 3}
    interface_slice_allocation_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    interface_negative_0 := interface_slice_allocation_negative["interface"] + len(input)
    _ = interface_negative_0
    slice_negative_1 := interface_slice_allocation_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_1
    allocation_negative_2 := interface_slice_allocation_negative["allocation"] + len(input)
    _ = allocation_negative_2
    return nil
}
